expenseCategories.name: Energy Consumption
expenseCategories.description: Expenses for electricity and diesel (for generators or transportation). This can be a significant portion of operating costs.

expenseCategories.description: Costs for bags and other packaging used for the final product and by-products.

expenseCategories.name: Raw Material (Paddy) Procurement
expenseCategories.description: : The largest expense, which involves purchasing raw unmilled rice from farmers or suppliers. The system needs to track purchase price, quantity, and quality.
